patch.insert_text: - Continue simvastatin 20 mg orally at night

reasons: Evidence explicitly states simvastatin 20 mg at night for blood fats, matching the inserted claim
Simvastatin is not mentioned anywhere in the existing note
A medication order belongs in Assessment and Plan; fits with the lipid/metabolic management
